name: Acceptance of executed work volume
description: A contractor reports a completed work volume for a billing period. Technical supervision (технадзор) cross-checks it against an independent as-built survey and accepts a quantity, which becomes earned value on the КС-3 payment certificate, less guarantee retention.

evidence.description: Обмерная ведомость / executive geodetic survey — the measured executed volume. Drives payment.
Протокол испытаний бетона (28 сут.) — 28-day compressive-strength lab report for the grade.
Общий журнал работ — daily works log.
Reference to the signed АОСР (hidden-works act) for the rebar/formwork covered by this pour.
ТТН на бетонную смесь — concrete delivery notes (supply side; proves material arrived, not that work was executed).

checks.description: The executive documentation supervision signs against is complete.

Claimed volume must agree with the independent survey within 5% of the surveyed value or 2 m³ (whichever is greater) AND within the survey's expanded uncertainty U (k=2, ~95% per JCGM 100). Error is measured against the survey as the traceable reference (VIM §2.16).

reviewer.description: Технадзор / customer representative who accepts responsibility for the acceptance.

consequences.description: КС-3 payment certificate: accepted volume × contract unit rate, less 5% guarantee retention (гарантийное удержание).
The foundation closeout package is unlocked.
The accepting supervisor owns the accepted fact.
